PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONGE, REYNA AKA REYNA RUVALCABA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AYYOUB, NIHAD JWEINAT, CHARLEY M. $9,630.10 PRINCIPAL, $867.05 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,497.15, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR. CLAIM OF PLTF AGAINST TOYOTA MOTOR SALES, U.S.A. ONLY IS DENIED (AGAINST NIHAD AYYOUB & CHARLEY M. JWEINAT ONLY). STATUTORY COSTS AWARDED TO DEFT TOYOTA MOTOR SALES,USA ONLY. SEE AWARD AT LENGTH.
